results.rendered_html:
jvālā
1 A blaze, flame, illumination;  R. 15. 16 ;  Bh. 1. 95. 
2 Burnt rice.
Comp.
— jihvaḥ, -dhvajaḥ fire.
— mukhī a volcano.
— vaktraḥ an epithet of Śiva.
